title: Speedscale Traffic Snapshot
description: Represents a captured traffic snapshot in the Speedscale platform, containing recorded API requests and responses for replay.

id.description: Unique identifier for the traffic snapshot.

description.description: Optional description of what the snapshot captures.

capturedAt.description: Timestamp when the snapshot was captured.

source.description: Metadata about the traffic capture source.

service.description: Name of the service from which traffic was captured.

requestCount.description: Total number of API requests in the snapshot.

durationMs.description: Duration of the captured traffic window in milliseconds.

piiSanitized.description: Whether PII fields have been automatically masked.

tags.description: Labels for organizing and filtering snapshots.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the snapshot was saved to Speedscale.
